sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3768" key="a)kulwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκυλωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n3768.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with acorn-shaped ornament</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φιάλαι Ἐφ. Ἀρχ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1903.146</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (dub.).</sense> </entryFree>
